title: rivals craft modpack map inclued
body:
This map adds a Rivals mode to Minecraft Bedrock, inspired by the Roblox game RIVALS. It brings fast‑paced and competitive 1v1 battles designed for fun matches with your friends. Whether you want to test your aim, challenge someone, or host small duels, this mode delivers quick and intense combat inside a dedicated arena. Credits

Map & concept: Me

Inspiration: RIVALS (Roblox) https://www.roblox.com/games/17625359962/RIVALS

used mod: [TaCZ] Timeless and Classics Zero and [TACZ] LesRaisins Tactical Equipements (inclued)
